commands.name: constlevel
commands.description: Sets construction level required to forge.

commands.name: mainlevel
commands.description: Sets level required in primary path.

commands.name: secondarylevel
commands.description: Sets level required in secondary path.

commands.name: unique
commands.description: Item is unique (only one can exist).

commands.name: cursed
commands.description: Item is cursed and cannot be removed.

commands.name: noforgebonus
commands.description: Item doesn't benefit from forge bonuses.

commands.name: champprize
commands.description: Item can be won as championship prize.

commands.name: singlebattle
commands.description: Item only works for one battle.

commands.name: heavyitem
commands.description: Item is heavy and affects movement.

commands.name: nomounted
commands.description: Item cannot be used while mounted.

commands.name: onlymounted
commands.description: Item can only be used while mounted.

commands.name: nofemale
commands.description: Item cannot be used by females.

commands.name: onlyfemale
commands.description: Item can only be used by females.

commands.name: nocoldblood
commands.description: Item cannot be used by cold-blooded units.

commands.name: onlycoldblood
commands.description: Item can only be used by cold-blooded units.

commands.name: nodemon
commands.description: Item cannot be used by demons.

commands.name: onlydemon
commands.description: Item can only be used by demons.

commands.name: noundead
commands.description: Item cannot be used by undead.

commands.name: onlyundead
commands.description: Item can only be used by undead.

commands.name: noinanim
commands.description: Item cannot be used by inanimates.

commands.name: onlyinanim
commands.description: Item can only be used by inanimates.

commands.name: noimmobile
commands.description: Item cannot be used by immobile units.

commands.name: onlyimmobile
commands.description: Item can only be used by immobile units.

commands.name: yearturn
commands.description: Active only on this turn of year.
